use_codes.desc: USE AS REPLACEMENT SOLUTION, HEMOFILTRATION SOLUTION OR HEMODIAFILTRATION SOLUTION IN CONTINUOUS RENAL REPLACEMENT THERAPY

indications.text:
NORMOCARB HF™, after dilution, is indicated in adults and children for use as a replacement
solution in CRRT to replace water and to correct electrolytes and acid-base imbalance.

NORMOCARB HF™, after dilution, is indicated in adult and pediatric patients for use as a replacement
solution in Continuous Renal Replacement Therapy (CRRT) to replace water and to correct
electrolytes and acid-base imbalance.
